#### FORM ####
package test;

import java.time.Duration;

import org.openqa.selenium.By;
import org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver;
import org.openqa.selenium.WebElement;
import org.openqa.selenium.WindowType;
import org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver;
import org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait;
import org.openqa.selenium.JavascriptExecutor;

public class newca1 {

    public static void main(String[] args) throws InterruptedException {
    	//#TODO Auto-generated method stub
    			System.setProperty("webdriver.chrome.driver", "C:\\Users\\DELL\\Downloads\\chromedriver-win64 (1)\\chromedriver-win64\\chromedriver.exe");

        //#Use Selenium Manager (no need setProperty)
        WebDriver driver = new ChromeDriver();

        driver.manage().window().maximize();
        WebDriverWait wait = new WebDriverWait(driver, Duration.ofSeconds(10));

        driver.get("file:///D:/Y III Sem II/SQA/assessment.html");

        
        driver.findElement(By.id("name")).sendKeys("Test User");
        //driver.findElement(By.id("lname")).sendKeys("Kathir");
        driver.findElement(By.id("email")).sendKeys("test@gmail.com");
        driver.findElement(By.id("password")).sendKeys("Test@123");
        driver.findElement(By.id("password")).sendKeys("Test@123");
        driver.findElement(By.id("mobile")).sendKeys("0765643212");
     
        //#radio button verification
        WebElement radio1 = driver.findElement(By.name("gender"));
        radio1.click();
        //#RADIO and CHECK BOX
        //driver.findElement(By.name("gender")).click();
        //driver.findElement(By.name("hobby")).click();
        //#Select Gender = Female
        //driver.findElement(By.name("gender")).click();
        
        //#checkbox verification
        WebElement option1 = driver.findElement(By.id("reading"));
        option1.click();
        
        WebElement option2 = driver.findElement(By.id("music"));
        option2.click();
        //driver.findElement(By.id("reading")).click();
        //driver.findElement(By.id("music")).click();

        //#Dropdown
        driver.findElement(By.id("country")).sendKeys("Sri Lanka");
        //#Set Experience slider to 8
        WebElement slider = driver.findElement(By.id("experience"));
        
        JavascriptExecutor js = (JavascriptExecutor) driver;
        js.executeScript("arguments[0].value='8';", slider);
        //#Textfeild
        //driver.findElement(By.id("bio")).sendKeys("A dedicated and enthusiastic university graduate with a background in Computer Science and industry experience");

        //#Date of Birth
        WebElement dob = driver.findElement(By.id("dob"));
        dob.sendKeys("01-01-2000");
        //#Submit button use Type
        //WebElement submit_button = driver.findElement(By.xpath("//button[@type='submit']"));
		//submit_button.click();
		
		//full_name.clear();
		//submit_button.click();
	
        //#Click submit
        //driver.findElement(By.id("submit")).click();

        //#Clear name and submit again
        //WebElement nameField = driver.findElement(By.id("fn"));
        //nameField.clear();
        
        //#Use button text
        //driver.findElement(By.xpath("//button[text()='submit']")).click();
        
        //#Use type attribute
        //driver.findElement(By.xpath("//button[@type='submit']")).click();
        
        //#Use CSS selector
        //driver.findElement(By.cssSelector("button[type='submit']")).click();
		
		//#Open a new tab
        //driver.switchTo().newWindow(WindowType.TAB);
        //driver.get("https://www.google.com");
		
		//#Clear name field to make it invalid
		//WebElement nameField = driver.findElement(By.id("name"));
		//nameField.clear();

		//#Click submit to trigger validation
		//driver.findElement(By.xpath("//button[@type='submit']")).click();

        //#Capture validation message
		//String validationMsg = nameField.getAttribute("validationMessage");
		//System.out.println("Validation Message: " + validationMsg);
        
        //Thread.sleep(5000);
        //driver.quit();
    }
}
####################### employee #########################
package test;

import java.time.Duration;
import java.util.List;

import org.openqa.selenium.Alert;
import org.openqa.selenium.By;
import org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver;
import org.openqa.selenium.WebElement;
import org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver;
import org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.ExpectedConditions;
import org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait;

public class employee {

	public static void main(String[] args) throws InterruptedException {
		System.setProperty("webdriver.chrome.driver",
                "C:\\Users\\DELL\\Downloads\\chromedriver-win64 (1)\\chromedriver-win64\\chromedriver.exe");

        WebDriver driver = new ChromeDriver();
        driver.manage().window().maximize();

        WebDriverWait wait = new WebDriverWait(driver, Duration.ofSeconds(1));

        // =========================
        // OPEN LOGIN PAGE
        // =========================
        driver.get("http://localhost/employee/admin");

        // =========================
        // 1. EMPTY USERNAME & PASSWORD
        // =========================
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();

        try {
            WebElement error = wait.until(
                    ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                            By.xpath("//*[contains(text(),'required') or contains(text(),'empty')]")
                    )
            );
            System.out.println("EMPTY VALIDATION: " + error.getText());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println("No empty field validation message found");
        }

        // =========================
        // 2. ONLY USERNAME EMPTY
        // =========================
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).clear();

        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).sendKeys("admin123");
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();

        try {
            WebElement error = wait.until(
                    ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                            By.xpath("//*[contains(text(),'username')]")
                    )
            );
            System.out.println("USERNAME EMPTY: " + error.getText());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println("No username validation message");
        }

        // =========================
        // 3. ONLY PASSWORD EMPTY
        // =========================
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).clear();

        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).sendKeys("admin");
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();

        try {
            WebElement error = wait.until(
                    ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                            By.xpath("//*[contains(text(),'password')]")
                    )
            );
            System.out.println("PASSWORD EMPTY: " + error.getText());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println("No password validation message");
        }

        
        // =========================
        // 4. INVALID LOGIN
        // =========================
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).clear();

        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).sendKeys("wrongUser");
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).sendKeys("wrongPass");
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();

        try {
            WebElement error = wait.until(
                    ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                            By.xpath("//*[contains(text(),'Invalid') or contains(text(),'incorrect')]")
                    )
            );
            System.out.println("INVALID LOGIN: " + error.getText());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println("No invalid login message found");
        }

        // =========================
        // 5. VALID LOGIN
        // =========================
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).clear();

        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).sendKeys("admin");
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).sendKeys("admin123");
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();

        wait.until(ExpectedConditions.urlContains("admin"));

        if (driver.getCurrentUrl().contains("admin")) {
            System.out.println("LOGIN SUCCESS");
        } else {
            System.out.println("LOGIN FAILED");
        }

        
        // =========================
        // 6. NAVIGATE TO EMPLOYEE PAGE
        // =========================
        try {
            driver.findElement(By.linkText("Employee")).click();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            driver.get("http://localhost/employee/admin/employee.php");
        }

        wait.until(ExpectedConditions.urlContains("employee"));
        System.out.println("EMPLOYEE PAGE LOADED");

        // =========================
        // 7. CLICK ADD NEW
        // =========================
        WebElement addBtn = wait.until(
                ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(
                        By.xpath("//button[contains(text(),'Add')]")
                )
        );
        addBtn.click();
        System.out.println("ADD NEW CLICKED");

        // =========================
        // 8. EMPTY FORM VALIDATION
        // =========================

        try {
            WebElement error = wait.until(
                    ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                            By.xpath("//*[contains(text(),'required')]")
                    )
            );
            System.out.println("FORM EMPTY VALIDATION: " + error.getText());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println("No form validation message");
        }

        // =========================
        // 9. FILL FORM
        // =========================
        driver.findElement(By.name("firstname")).sendKeys("ABC");
        driver.findElement(By.name("middlename")).sendKeys("EFG");
        driver.findElement(By.name("lastname")).sendKeys("ASDF");
        driver.findElement(By.name("department")).sendKeys("Finance");
        driver.findElement(By.name("position")).sendKeys("Manager");

        // =========================
        // 10. SAVE EMPLOYEE
        // =========================
        WebElement saveBtn = wait.until(
                ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(By.name("save"))
        );
        saveBtn.click();

        try {
            WebElement successMsg = wait.until(
                    ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                            By.xpath("//*[contains(text(),'success') or contains(text(),'added')]")
                    )
            );
            System.out.println("SAVE SUCCESS: " + successMsg.getText());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println("No success message found");
        }

        // =========================
        // END
        // =========================
        // driver.quit();
        
     // =========================
     // CLICK EDIT BUTTON
     // =========================
     WebElement editBtn = wait.until(
             ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(
                     By.xpath("(//button[contains(@class,'edit_employee')])[1]")
             )
     );
     editBtn.click();


     // =========================
     // WAIT FOR EDIT POPUP (IMPORTANT)
     // =========================
     WebElement modal = wait.until(
             ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                     By.xpath("//div[contains(@class,'modal') and contains(@style,'display: block')]")
             )
     );


     // =========================
     // EDIT FIELDS (INSIDE MODAL)
     // =========================
     WebElement middleName1 = wait.until(
             ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                     By.xpath("//div[contains(@class,'modal') and contains(@style,'display: block')]//input[@name='middlename']")
             )
     );

     middleName1.clear();
     middleName1.sendKeys("Updated mid Name");


     // Example: edit another field
     WebElement firstName = driver.findElement(
             By.xpath("//div[contains(@class,'modal') and contains(@style,'display: block')]//input[@name='firstname']")
     );
     firstName.clear();
     firstName.sendKeys("Updated Fst Name");


     // =========================
     // CLICK SAVE / UPDATE BUTTON (INSIDE MODAL)
     // =========================
     WebElement saveBtn1 = wait.until(
             ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(
                     By.xpath("//div[contains(@class,'modal') and contains(@style,'display: block')]//button[@name='save']")
             )
     );
     saveBtn1.click();

     try {
    	    Alert alert = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.alertIsPresent());
    	    System.out.println("Alert: " + alert.getText());
    	    alert.accept(); // Click OK
    	} catch (Exception e) {
    	    System.out.println("No alert appeared");
    	}

     // =========================
     // VALIDATE SUCCESS MESSAGE
     // =========================
     try {
         WebElement successMsg = wait.until(
                 ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                         By.xpath("//*[contains(text(),'updated') or contains(text(),'success')]")
                 )
         );
         System.out.println("UPDATE SUCCESS: " + successMsg.getText());
     } catch (Exception e) {
         System.out.println("No update message found");
     }
     
     // =========================
     // CLICK DELETE BUTTON
     // =========================
     WebElement deleteBtn = wait.until(
    	        ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(
    	                By.xpath("//button[contains(@class,'remove_employee') and @data-id='13']")
    	        )
    	);
    	deleteBtn.click();


     // Handle confirmation alert
     try {
         Alert alert = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.alertIsPresent());

         System.out.println("Alert text: " + alert.getText());

         // Choose ONE:
         //alert.accept();   // OK button (confirm delete)
         alert.dismiss(); // Cancel button (abort delete)

     } catch (Exception e) {
         System.out.println("No alert appeared");
     }

     try {
 	    Alert alert = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.alertIsPresent());
 	    System.out.println("Alert: " + alert.getText());
 	    alert.accept(); // Click OK
 	} catch (Exception e) {
 	    System.out.println("No alert appeared");
 	}
     
     
     //======================LOGOUT-BUTTON=======================
     driver.findElement(By.xpath("//a[contains(text(),'Admin')]")).click();
	}

}

################### Method call employee #######
package com.test5;

import java.time.Duration;
import org.openqa.selenium.*;
import org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver;
import org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.*;

public class FullProjOne {
    WebDriver driver;
    WebDriverWait wait;

    // =========================
    // SETUP
    // =========================
    public void setup() {
        System.setProperty("webdriver.chrome.driver",
                "C:\\Users\\User\\Downloads\\chromedriver-win64\\chromedriver.exe");
        driver = new ChromeDriver();
        driver.manage().window().maximize();
        wait = new WebDriverWait(driver, Duration.ofSeconds(10));
    }

    // =========================
    // OPEN LOGIN PAGE
    // =========================
    public void openLoginPage() {
        driver.get("http://localhost/employee/admin");
    }

    // =========================
    // LOGIN VALIDATIONS
    // =========================
    public void emptyLogin() {
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();
        printMessage("EMPTY VALIDATION", "//*[contains(text(),'required') or contains(text(),'empty')]");
    }

    public void usernameEmpty() {
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).sendKeys("admin123");
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();
        printMessage("USERNAME EMPTY", "//*[contains(text(),'username')]");
    }

    public void passwordEmpty() {
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).clear();
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).sendKeys("admin");
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();
        printMessage("PASSWORD EMPTY", "//*[contains(text(),'password')]");
    }

    public void invalidLogin() {
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).sendKeys("wrongUser");
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).sendKeys("wrongPass");
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();
        printMessage("INVALID LOGIN", "//*[contains(text(),'Invalid') or contains(text(),'incorrect')]");
    }

    public void validLogin() {
        driver.findElement(By.name("username")).sendKeys("admin");
        driver.findElement(By.name("password")).sendKeys("admin123");
        driver.findElement(By.cssSelector(".btn.btn-primary.btn-block")).click();
        wait.until(ExpectedConditions.urlContains("admin"));
        System.out.println(driver.getCurrentUrl().contains("admin") ? "LOGIN SUCCESS" : "LOGIN FAILED");
    }

    // =========================
    // EMPLOYEE PAGE
    // =========================
    public void navigateEmployeePage() {
        try {
            driver.findElement(By.linkText("Employee")).click();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            driver.get("http://localhost/employee/admin/employee.php");
        }
        wait.until(ExpectedConditions.urlContains("employee"));
        System.out.println("EMPLOYEE PAGE LOADED");
    }

    public void addEmployee(String fname, String mname, String lname, String dept, String pos) {
        WebElement addBtn = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(By.xpath("//button[contains(text(),'Add')]")));
        addBtn.click();
        driver.findElement(By.name("firstname")).sendKeys(fname);
        driver.findElement(By.name("middlename")).sendKeys(mname);
        driver.findElement(By.name("lastname")).sendKeys(lname);
        driver.findElement(By.name("department")).sendKeys(dept);
        driver.findElement(By.name("position")).sendKeys(pos);

        WebElement saveBtn = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(By.name("save")));
        saveBtn.click();
        printMessage("SAVE SUCCESS", "//*[contains(text(),'success') or contains(text(),'added')]");
    }

    public void editEmployee() {
        WebElement editBtn = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(
                By.xpath("(//button[contains(@class,'edit_employee')])[1]")));
        editBtn.click();

        WebElement middleName = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(
                By.xpath("//div[contains(@class,'modal') and contains(@style,'display: block')]//input[@name='middlename']")));
        middleName.clear();
        middleName.sendKeys("Updated mid Name");

        WebElement firstName = driver.findElement(
                By.xpath("//div[contains(@class,'modal') and contains(@style,'display: block')]//input[@name='firstname']"));
        firstName.clear();
        firstName.sendKeys("Updated Fst Name");

        WebElement saveBtn = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(
                By.xpath("//div[contains(@class,'modal') and contains(@style,'display: block')]//button[@name='save']")));
        saveBtn.click();

        handleAlert("UPDATE ALERT");
        printMessage("UPDATE SUCCESS", "//*[contains(text(),'updated') or contains(text(),'success')]");
    }

    public void deleteEmployee() {
        WebElement deleteBtn = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.elementToBeClickable(
                By.xpath("//button[contains(@class,'remove_employee') and @data-id='13']")));
        deleteBtn.click();
        handleAlert("DELETE ALERT");
    }

    public void logout() {
        driver.findElement(By.xpath("//a[contains(text(),'Admin')]")).click();
        driver.quit();
        System.out.println("LOGOUT SUCCESS");
    }

    // =========================
    // HELPER METHODS
    // =========================
    private void printMessage(String label, String xpath) {
        try {
            WebElement msg = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.visibilityOfElementLocated(By.xpath(xpath)));
            System.out.println(label + ": " + msg.getText());
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println("No " + label.toLowerCase() + " message found");
        }
    }

    private void handleAlert(String label) {
        try {
            Alert alert = wait.until(ExpectedConditions.alertIsPresent());
            System.out.println(label + ": " + alert.getText());
            alert.accept();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            System.out.println("No alert appeared for " + label);
        }
    }

    // =========================
    // MAIN
    // =========================
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        FullProjOne proj = new FullProjOne();
        proj.setup();
        proj.openLoginPage();
        proj.emptyLogin();
        proj.usernameEmpty();
        proj.passwordEmpty();
        proj.invalidLogin();
        proj.validLogin();
        proj.navigateEmployeePage();
        proj.addEmployee("ABC", "EFG", "ASDF", "Finance", "Manager");
        proj.editEmployee();
        proj.deleteEmployee();
        proj.logout();
    }
}
###################### CA 2 #########################
package test1;

import java.time.Duration;

import org.openqa.selenium.Alert;
import org.openqa.selenium.By;
import org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver;
import org.openqa.selenium.WebElement;
import org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver;

import org.testng.annotations.AfterClass;
import org.testng.annotations.BeforeClass;
import org.testng.annotations.Test;

@Test
public class ca2 {


WebDriver driver;

@BeforeClass
public void setup() {

    System.setProperty(
            "webdriver.chrome.driver",
            "C:\\Users\\DELL\\Downloads\\chromedriver-win64 (1)\\chromedriver-win64\\chromedriver.exe");

    driver = new ChromeDriver();

    driver.manage().window().maximize();

    driver.manage().timeouts()
            .pageLoadTimeout(Duration.ofSeconds(10));

    driver.get("http://localhost/student/admin");
}

public void adminLogin() throws InterruptedException {

    Thread.sleep(2000);

    WebElement username =
            driver.findElement(By.name("username"));

    WebElement password =
            driver.findElement(By.name("password"));

    if (username.getAttribute("value").isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("username is empty");
    }

    if (password.getAttribute("value").isEmpty()) {
        System.out.println("password is empty");
    }

    username.sendKeys("admin");
    password.sendKeys("admin@123");

    driver.findElement(
            By.xpath("//*[@id=\"login-frm\"]/button[1]"))
            .click();

    Thread.sleep(3000);
}

public void urlValidation() throws InterruptedException {

    driver.findElement(
            By.xpath("//*[@id=\"Employee\"]"))
            .click();

    String currentURL =
            driver.getCurrentUrl();

    String expectedURL =
            "http://localhost/student/admin/?page=students";

    if (currentURL.equals(expectedURL)) {

        System.out.println(
                "URL Validation Success");

    } else {

        System.out.println(
                "URL Validation Fail");
    }

    Thread.sleep(2000);
}

public void searchStudent() throws InterruptedException {

    driver.findElement(
            By.xpath("//*[@id=\"table_filter\"]/label/input"))
            .sendKeys("Ad");

    Thread.sleep(2000);
}

public void addStudent() throws InterruptedException {

    driver.findElement(
            By.id("new_std_btn"))
            .click();

    Thread.sleep(2000);

    driver.findElement(By.name("firstname"))
            .sendKeys("Stanely");

    driver.findElement(By.name("lastname"))
            .sendKeys("Lambert");

    driver.findElement(By.name("grade"))
            .sendKeys("Grade 11");

    driver.findElement(By.name("phone"))
            .sendKeys("0777889090");

    driver.findElement(
            By.xpath("//button[contains(text(),'Save')]"))
            .click();

    Thread.sleep(2000);

    Alert alert =
            driver.switchTo().alert();

    System.out.println(
            "Student Saving Alert Message is: "
                    + alert.getText());

    alert.accept();

    Thread.sleep(2000);
}

public void deleteStudent() throws InterruptedException {

    driver.findElement(
            By.xpath("//*[@id=\"table\"]/tbody/tr[1]/td[7]/center/button[2]/i"))
            .click();

    Thread.sleep(2000);

    Alert alert =
            driver.switchTo().alert();

    System.out.println(
            "Student Deleting Alert Message is: "
                    + alert.getText());

    alert.dismiss();

    Thread.sleep(2000);
}

public void updateStudent() throws InterruptedException {

    driver.findElement(
            By.xpath("(//*[@id=\"table\"]/tbody/tr[1]/td[7]/center/button)[1]"))
            .click();

    Thread.sleep(2000);

    WebElement lastName =
            driver.findElement(By.name("lastname"));

    lastName.clear();

    lastName.sendKeys("User");

    driver.findElement(
            By.name("save"))
            .click();

    Thread.sleep(2000);

    Alert alert =
            driver.switchTo().alert();

    System.out.println(
            "Student Updating Alert Message is: "
                    + alert.getText());

    alert.accept();

    Thread.sleep(2000);
}

public void logout() {

    driver.findElement(
            By.xpath("/html/body/nav/div/div[2]/a"))
            .click();

    System.out.println(
            "Logout successful");
}

@AfterClass
public void closeBrowser() {

    if (driver != null) {
        driver.quit();
    }
}


}

#### TestNG ####
package testngExam2;

import org.testng.annotations.Test;

public class DependentClass {
	
	@Test
	public void registerAccount() {
		System.out.println("First register your account");
	}
	
	@Test
	public void sendEmail() {
		System.out.println("Send email after login");
	}
	
	@Test(dependsOnMethods = "registerAccount")
	public void login() {
		System.out.println("login to the account after registartion");
	}
	
	@Test
	public void homepage() {
		System.out.println("This is the home page");
	}
	
	@Test(dependsOnMethods = {"login", "homepage"})
	public void logout() {
		System.out.println("Logout current session");
	}
}

#############################

package testngExam2;

import org.testng.annotations.Test;

public class FirstTestNG {

	@Test
	public void registerAccount() {
		System.out.println("First register your account");
	}
	
	@Test
	public void sendEmail() {
		System.out.println("Send email after login");
	}
	
	@Test(dependsOnMethods = "registerAccount")
	public void login() {
		System.out.println("login to the account after registartion");
	}
	
	@Test
	public void homepage() {
		System.out.println("This is the home page");
	}
	
	@Test
	public void logout() {
		System.out.println("Logout current session");
	}
}

#################################

package testngExam2;

import org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver;
import org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver;
import org.testng.annotations.Test;

public class SecondTestNG {

	
		@Test(invocationCount = 3, threadPoolSize = 3)
	    public void openGoogle(){

	        System.setProperty("webdriver.chrome.driver",
	                "C:\\Users\\User\\Downloads\\chromedriver-win64 (2)\\chromedriver-win64\\chromedriver.exe");

	        WebDriver driver = new ChromeDriver();

	        driver.get("https://www.google.com");

	        System.out.println("Google page is open");

	        driver.quit();
	    }
}

########## paralel.xml  ######################
<suite parallel="classes" name="Suite">
<test thread-count="5" parallel="classes" name="Test">
<classes>
<class name="testngExam2.FirstTestNG"/>
<class name="testngExam2.SecondTestNG"/>
</classes>
</test>
<!--  Test  -->
</suite>
<!--  Suite  -->

##########  sequential.xml ####################
<suite name="SequentialSuite">
<test name="SequentialTest">
<classes>
<class name="testngExam2.FirstTestNG"/>
<class name="testngExam2.SecondTestNG"/>
</classes>
</test>
</suite>
###############################################
